definition_en: A general direction in which data is changing over time
example: The graph shows an upward trend in sales.

definition_en: To change frequently and irregularly
example: Temperatures fluctuated wildly throughout the month.

definition_en: The highest point in a series of data
example: Sales reached a peak in December.

definition_en: A gradual decrease in amount or quality
example: There has been a steady decline in car sales.

definition_en: A period of little change after growth or increase
example: After rapid growth, profits reached a plateau.

definition_en: Large or important enough to be noticed
example: There was a significant rise in unemployment.

definition_en: Very small or slight
example: There was only a marginal improvement in results.

definition_en: A part of a total considered as a fraction
example: A large proportion of students passed the exam.

definition_en: To be greater than a particular amount
example: Costs exceeded the original budget by 20%.

definition_en: Used to show that a number is not exact
example: Approximately 60% of respondents agreed.

definition_en: Sudden and large in amount
example: There was a sharp increase in prices last year.

definition_en: Happening slowly and steadily over time
example: There has been a gradual improvement in standards.

definition_en: A relationship between two sets of data
example: There is a strong correlation between exercise and health.

definition_en: A data point that is very different from the others
example: The outlier in the data skewed the average significantly.

definition_en: Not changing much; regular and continuous
example: The company showed steady growth over five years.

definition_en: To increase to twice the original amount
example: The number of users doubled in just six months.

definition_en: To reduce to half the original amount
example: The cost of solar panels has halved in ten years.

definition_en: The result of adding numbers together and dividing by how many there are
example: The average temperature in July is 28 degrees.

definition_en: A study in which information is collected from a group of people
example: The survey showed that 80% were satisfied with the service.

definition_en: Numbers used as data or statistics
example: The latest figures show a drop in unemployment.
